meta_title: For Freelancers: content creation to Solve can't debug code (Beginner Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to content creation and overcome can't debug code. A Beginner-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: Content Creation to Solve Debugging Woes
content.seo_description: Stop struggling with broken code. Learn how to leverage content creation and AI tools like Antigravity and Claude Code to debug faster and ship client projects.
content.answer_block: When you hit a debugging wall, stop staring at the screen. Use content creation to externalize your logic by documenting the error flow. Then, feed this structured context into Antigravity or Claude Code. This transforms abstract errors into actionable, high-quality code patches, slashing your debugging time by up to 80%.
content.intro:
The clock is ticking, the client is waiting, and your terminal is bleeding red errors. We have all been there—staring at a stack trace that makes no sense, feeling the crushing weight of a deadline slipping away. It is the silent killer of every freelancer’s profit margin: the inability to debug efficiently.

But what if you stopped fighting the code and started architecting the solution? By shifting your mindset toward structured content creation—documenting your logic, edge cases, and expected outputs—you gain the clarity needed to conquer even the most stubborn bugs. With the right AI-powered workflow, you stop being a frantic debugger and become a systematic builder.

steps.title: Document the Failure State
steps.description: Before fixing, write a brief 'Post-Mortem' note describing the expected vs. actual behavior. This forces you to isolate the specific function causing the crash.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the following error log and the surrounding function. Identify the root cause and provide a step-by-step breakdown of why it failed.

steps.title: Abstract the Logic
steps.description: Create a clean, minimal reproduction script. If you can't describe the bug in 5 lines of code, you don't understand the bug yet.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a minimal reproduction script for this bug. Focus on isolating the logic from external dependencies.

steps.title: Automate Context Injection
steps.description: Use Claude Code to read your project structure and the failing module, then generate a fix based on your documented requirements.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Review the project architecture and suggest a refactor to prevent this specific class of error in the future.

steps.title: Generate Test Coverage
steps.description: Never ship a fix without a test. Create a unit test that fails on the bug and passes on the fix to ensure it stays dead.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a Jest unit test that covers this edge case and ensures the fix remains permanent.

steps.title: Synthesize Documentation
steps.description: Update your codebase documentation with the solution. This turns a debugging session into a knowledge asset for your next client project.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Summarize this debugging session into a technical note for my project README.

pro_tips: Always use the 'Explain' command before 'Fix' to ensure you understand the AI's logic before applying it.
Treat every bug as a feature request; document the fix so you can reuse the pattern in future projects.
Use Claude Code's history logs to identify which modules are 'bug-prone' and refactor them during downtime.
When debugging complex state, ask the AI to generate a Mermaid diagram of the flow to visualize the bottleneck.
Keep your context window clean by deleting temporary test files after the fix is verified.
content.next_steps: Integrate these steps into your daily sprint, build a library of your fixed modules, and start charging for your increased velocity.
content.conversion_block: Stop letting bugs dictate your income. Master these workflows to ship faster, impress your clients, and reclaim your time. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
